issues: Control mode normalizes weights at scoring time instead of using raw accumulation pattern. Fix: pre-normalize base weights in the factory so controlBlend uses simple clamp(subScore) * weight accumulation.
reviews.summary: Fidelity issue: controlBlend divides by totalW at runtime instead of using pre-normalized weights from factory. All other criteria pass: adaptive mode fidelity, code quality, registration, config, assembly, treatment config.
